overview: MeshGen AI is a FRIDAY-style real-time intelligence dashboard with an Iron Man HUD aesthetic. It features an AI chat assistant, live global news tracking with map event pins, multi-agent automation, smart alerts, video briefings, voice input/output, Stripe subscription tiers, and a full analytics dashboard.
features: FRIDAY-style AI chat with real-time news context
Live global news engine with GNews API polling every 5 minutes
Color-coded event map pins (red/amber/green by severity)
Multi-agent HUD with News, Map, and Video agent status cards
Smart Alerts panel with CRITICAL/HIGH/MEDIUM severity detection
AI Video Summaries with browser TTS narration and slide controls
Voice Tab with speech recognition input and TTS output
Analytics Dashboard with event counters and sparkline chart
Stripe subscription tiers (Free/Pro/Enterprise) with quota enforcement
Event persistence with 500-event canister state circular buffer
Transport Tracker with animated mock vehicles on interactive map
Iron Man HUD aesthetic with OKLCH navy/gold, scan-line effects
